headline: Progressive's April Earnings Increase Y/Y on Higher Premiums
summary: PGR's April results reflect higher revenues and a rise in investment income, partially offset by an increase in expenses and a weaker combined ratio.

raw.headline: Progressive's April Earnings Increase Y/Y on Higher Premiums
raw.summary: PGR's April results reflect higher revenues and a rise in investment income, partially offset by an increase in expenses and a weaker combined ratio.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Progressive, Raises Price Target to $222
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains Progressive (NYSE:PGR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $218 to $222.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Progressive, Raises Price Target to $222
raw.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains Progressive (NYSE:PGR) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $218 to $222.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Progressive, Lowers Price Target to $320
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Joshua Shanker   maintains Progressive (NYSE:PGR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $325 to $320.
